creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #2)

This should be fixed in ports 8a8f565d84a6425507b68b6c3af3b9944a6a4961 (the same method as your patch). Thanks.

I totally agree with you that the proper fix is to fix the define-matching RE. However, I do not want to spend more time on it since it seems to be a dead project (inactive upstream).
